display_text: Enhancement Evolved, Tier N/A: Grants +40 to the primary attribute of the holder's hero. For Universal Heroes, it grants +24 to each of Strength, Agility, and Intelligence instead. Does not have an active ability or consume a slot. Stats: Attribute Bonus: +40 Primary or +24 All for Universal.
